data.headline: Wirtzplay crowned Ballon d'FPL champion after thrilling final GW.
team: Haaland, B.Fernandes, Anderson led the team's strong finish.
Raya, Gabriel, Senesi also impressed with high form.
league: wirtzplay secures Ballon d'FPL title, finishing 1st overall.
Fredrick Soong wins by 13 points over MOUsalah.
market: Watkins, Doku, Truffert ended the season in top form.
Truffert (BOU) showed strong form as a value gem.
An 8.0m bank offers significant flexibility for next season.
